title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 4 - Sensing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's foundational computer science course covering intellectual enterprises and programming. Chapter 4 focuses on Sensing. The course is offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare with extensive community engagement channels.
writeup: This is Chapter 4, Sensing, from CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu, captured as a live, unedited session. The chapter centers on how AI systems take in information from the world, touching on computer vision and sensor systems. CS50 is Harvard University's foundational computer science course, and the AI material is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with community engagement channels.
